title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Narrator, Luffy, Enel, Calgara, Nami. Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your bias- phemous Insolence knows no bounds!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Reaching enel will be impossible then!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The city ruins below are visible now!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Oh no! Wyper's still lying over there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't have the power to destroy...

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: No matter where shandora is now...

summary: Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.
